title: BEM-866 workflow presence diag
objective:
Run script:
"""
wf = Path('.github/workflows/claude_write_selftest.yml')
text = wf.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') if wf.exists() else ''
checks = {
    'file_exists': wf.exists(),
    'has_name': 'name: claude_write_selftest' in text,
    'has_on': 'on:' in text,
    'has_workflow_dispatch': 'workflow_dispatch:' in text,
    'has_inputs': 'inputs:' in text,
    'has_trace_id': 'trace_id:' in text,
    'has_permissions': 'permissions:' in text,
    'has_checkout': 'actions/checkout@v4' in text,
    'has_commit': 'git commit' in text,
    'has_push': 'git push' in text,
}
status = 'WORKFLOW_FILE_OK' if all(checks.values()) else 'WORKFLOW_FILE_BAD'
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_WORKFLOW_PRESENCE_' + status + '.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-866 workflow presence diag\nStatus: ' + status + '\n' + '\n'.join('- ' + k + ': ' + str(v) for k,v in checks.items()) + '\n\nWorkflow prefix:\n' + text[:3000] + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('workflow presence diag: ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
